_comment: darkmux profile registry — example. Four reference profiles in increasing capacity order: fast → balanced → deep → gpt-oss. Replace the model ids with what you have downloaded in LMStudio (run `lms ls` to see).

fast.description: Single-turn tasks. Slim primary, no compactor — fastest dispatch, lowest RAM.

balanced.description: Mid-range tasks. Tuned compaction with a small companion compactor — predictable behavior across mixed workloads.

deep.description: Long agentic tasks. Maximum primary context for fewer compactions; companion compactor as safety net.

gpt-oss.description: OpenAI gpt-oss-120b (MXFP4 quantization) for Apple Silicon — primary at 100K with a 4B compactor at 68K, per Article 2's small-companion-compactor pattern. Requires OpenClaw >= v2026.5.9-beta.1 (harmony format / tool-payload fix).
